[PATCH] devel/libCello: update 1.1.7 → 2.1.0, improve port

+ Add docs and DOCS option                                                                                                             
+ Add examples and EXAMPLES option                                                                                                     
+ Add TEST_TARGET to build and run tests                                                                                               
+ Build also shared library alongside static                                                                                           
* Improve pkg-descr
